title: schmidtottia parvifolia
intro: Schmidtottia parvifolia, also known as the dwarf hibiscus, is a plant species belonging to the family Muntingiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving cough, and easing congestion, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Schmidtottia parvifolia often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to medicinal products.
